title: Le voulé : le BBQ mahorais qui sent bon l'océan 🌊🔥
hook: À Mayotte, le dimanche se passe les pieds dans le sable et les mains pleines de saveurs.
hook_punch: Ce repas va vous donner faim

caption.caption: Un BBQ les pieds dans le sable, ça vous tente ? 🌊🔥 Découvrez le voulé, ce repas 100% mahorais qui sent bon l’océan… Vous le connaissiez ? 👇
caption.text:
Un BBQ les pieds dans le sable, ça vous tente ? 🌊🔥 Découvrez le voulé, ce repas 100% mahorais qui sent bon l’océan… Vous le connaissiez ? 👇

#mayotte #976 #oceanindien #voyage #gastronomie #cuisinedumonde #barbecue #plage #culturemayotte #saveurslocales #tradition #ileauxparfums #foodie #decouverte

scenes.narration: Et si le vrai rendez-vous du week-end, c’était ce moment où les Mahorais se retrouvent autour du feu, à partager un repas qui embaume le lagon et la fraternité ?
visuals: aerial shot golden sandy beach with families gathering under palm trees at sunset
medium shot group of people laughing and cooking on open fire near the shore
close-up hands arranging fresh fish and plantains on large banana leaves
wide shot children playing in the sand while adults prepare the meal
scenes.image_prompt: A vibrant vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a golden sandy beach in Mayotte at sunset, families gathering under tall palm trees, smoke rising from open fire barbecues, children laughing and playing in the sand, adults grilling fresh fish and plantains on banana leaves, warm golden light reflecting on the turquoise lagoon, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Ici, les Mahorais transforment l’océan en festin : des poissons encore frétillants, des brochettes qui grésillent et des bananes plantains dorées à la braise, le tout sous les étoiles.
visuals: close-up fresh whole fish being seasoned with spices and lime
medium shot fish sizzling on a grill over open flames
hands flipping skewered meat and plantains on a barbecue
detail shot of golden grilled fish with crispy skin on banana leaves
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 close-up shot of fresh whole fish being seasoned with vibrant spices and lime on a banana leaf, hands gently rubbing the marinade, grill with sizzling fish and plantains over open flames, golden and crispy skin, warm and inviting atmosphere, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: On y grille poissons, brochettes de viande et bananes plantains

scenes.narration: Et quand le soleil plonge dans le lagon, les Mahorais s’installent pieds nus dans le sable chaud pour partager ce festin qui sent l’océan et la joie simple.
visuals: wide shot family sitting on the sand sharing a meal under string lights
medium shot friends laughing and passing around plates of food
close-up bare feet buried in warm sand near a beach fire
hands serving mataba and grilled fish on large communal plates
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a family sitting on golden sand at dusk, sharing a meal under soft string lights, friends laughing and passing around plates of grilled fish and mataba, bare feet playfully buried in the sand, warm firelight glowing, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Le repas se fait pieds dans le sable, en famille ou entre amis

scenes.narration: Et au cœur de ce moment magique, impossible de rater le mataba, ces feuilles de manioc pilées au lait de coco qui font danser les papilles sous les étoiles.
visuals: close-up hands pounding manioc leaves in a large wooden mortar
medium shot coconut milk being poured into a pot of pounded leaves
detail shot of mataba served in a traditional bowl with steam rising
hands scooping mataba onto a plate next to grilled fish
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 close-up shot of hands pounding fresh green manioc leaves in a large wooden mortar, coconut milk being poured into the mixture, steam rising from a pot of simmering mataba, served in a traditional wooden bowl next to grilled fish, warm and aromatic, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: Le mataba (feuilles de manioc pilé au coco) est souvent servi

scenes.narration: Face à l’océan, les Mahorais grillent poissons frais, brochettes et bananes plantains sur des braises crépitantes, un festin qui sent le partage et l’aventure.
visuals: close-up skewers of marinated meat and plantains on the grill
medium shot variety of grilled fish, meat, and plantains on banana leaves
hands brushing oil on plantains turning golden on the fire
detail shot of charred edges on grilled meat and fish
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 medium shot of a beach barbecue with a variety of grilled foods on banana leaves: skewers of marinated meat, golden plantains, and whole fish with charred edges, hands brushing oil on the grill, warm firelight, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: On y grille poissons, brochettes de viande et bananes plantains

scenes.narration: Et ce que personne ne vous dit, c’est que ce barbecue géant se termine toujours… par une bataille d’eau sous les étoiles, façon fête improvisée !
visuals: close-up surprised face of a child tasting a piece of grilled fish
medium shot elder explaining something to a group of young people
hands pointing at the grill while telling a story
wide shot of the beach with the sunset reflecting on the lagoon
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of an elder sitting on the sand, explaining something to a group of young people gathered around a beach barbecue, hands gesturing toward the grill, surprised and curious faces, golden sunset reflecting on the turquoise lagoon, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: Le voulé est un barbecue traditionnel mahorais sur la plage

scenes.narration: Derrière les grillades et les rires, le voulé est bien plus : un rendez-vous sacré où Mayotte célèbre son âme et sa douceur unique.
visuals: medium shot family holding hands in a circle before eating
close-up hands passing a plate of food from one person to another
wide shot of the beach filled with multiple family gatherings
detail shot of a child hugging an elder after the meal
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 medium shot of a large Mahorais family holding hands in a circle on the beach, eyes closed, sharing a moment of gratitude before eating, multiple family gatherings visible in the background, warm golden light, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Et c’est là, entre les palmiers qui dansent et les vagues qui murmurent, que les Mahorais allument leur feu sous un ciel qui n’appartient qu’à Mayotte.
visuals: aerial drone shot of the double lagoon surrounding the beach
medium shot waves gently crashing on the shore during sunset
close-up seashells and coral pieces scattered on the sand
wide shot of the beach with silhouettes of palm trees against the sky
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 aerial drone shot of Mayotte's double lagoon, turquoise waters gently crashing on the golden sandy beach, silhouettes of palm trees against a vibrant sunset sky, families gathered around beach fires, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K.
scenes.fact_used: Le voulé est un barbecue traditionnel mahorais sur la plage

scenes.narration: Entre sable chaud et éclats de rire, les Mahorais partagent plus qu’un repas : un moment unique où chaque bouchée raconte leur île.
visuals: close-up elderly hand teaching a child to grill fish
medium shot young and old laughing together while eating
hands of different ages holding the same plate of food
detail shot of a child’s small feet next to an elder’s in the sand
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 close-up shot of an elderly hand gently guiding a child’s hand to flip a piece of fish on the grill, both laughing, warm firelight illuminating their faces, golden sand under their feet, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: Le repas se fait pieds dans le sable, en famille ou entre amis

scenes.narration: Et quand le soleil plonge dans le lagon, les Mahorais savourent encore ces instants où le feu crépite, les histoires s’envolent et le temps semble s’arrêter.
visuals: medium shot people relaxing on the sand after eating
close-up hands playing traditional music instruments
wide shot of the beach with small fires still burning at night
detail shot of empty plates and leftover banana leaves on the sand
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 medium shot of a group of people relaxing on the sand after a meal, some playing traditional music instruments, small fires still burning on the beach under a starry night sky, empty plates and banana leaves scattered around, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: Le voulé est un barbecue traditionnel mahorais sur la plage

scenes.narration: Le voulé, c’est bien plus qu’un repas : l’âme de Mayotte qui s’anime entre flammes et rires, un dimanche où tout le monde se retrouve sous les étoiles.
visuals: aerial shot of the beach at night with multiple small fires glowing
medium shot silhouette of a family walking along the shore
close-up waves gently washing away footprints in the sand
wide shot of the lagoon reflecting the moonlight
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 aerial shot of Mayotte’s beach at night, multiple small fires glowing like stars on the sand, silhouettes of families walking along the shore, waves gently washing away footprints, the lagoon reflecting the moonlight, serene and magical, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Et vous, quel est ce plat qui vous fait voyager rien qu’en y pensant, celui qui rassemble tout le monde comme le voulé pour les Mahorais ?
visuals: close-up smiling face of a Mahorais looking at the camera
medium shot text overlay on screen: 'Et toi, tu goûterais au voulé ?'
hands holding a plate of grilled fish and mataba toward the camera
wide shot of the beach with the text: 'Like et abonne-toi pour plus de Mayotte !'
scenes.image_prompt: A vertical 9:16 close-up shot of a smiling Mahorais person looking directly at the camera, holding a plate of grilled fish and mataba, warm and inviting expression, text overlay on screen reading 'Et toi, tu goûterais au voulé ?', beach and sunset in the background, photorealistic, ultra-detailed.
scenes.fact_used: Le voulé est un barbecue traditionnel mahorais sur la plage
